calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee And Transferring Trusts' Jurisdiction And Situs; Mem. Of Pts And Author. In Support Thereof.
Off Calendar May-10-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rebecca Renzas for Mary Carner and Nancy Radin (Petitioners).

Mr. Renzas stated that the reason for transfer of the Trust to Delaware as opposed to New York was solely based on income taxation issues and that it is an economic advantage. Ms. Renzas also spoke of the provisions/language in the Trust and stated that the purpose of Trust was to preserve the corpus for the Remaindermen. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Sandberg.

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee And Transferring Trusts' Jurisdiction And Situs; Mem. Of Pts And Author. In Support Thereof.
Off Calendar Apr-13-2011 Continued To Apr-20-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Modifying Testamentary Trusts And Appointing Successor Trustees; Memo Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Sep-30-2000 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Greene and Rebecca Renzas for Mary Carner and Nancy Radin.

Counsel provided historical background, presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the appointment of Family Members as Trustees versus appointment of a Corporate Trustee and stated that the Trust is the payor of fees. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Order Modifying Testamentary Trusts And Appointing Successor Trustees; Memo Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jul-21-2010 Continued To Aug-25-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rebecca Renzas and Richard Greene for Mary Carner and Nancy Radin.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the Trust being modified to have the Sisters/Beneficiaries along with one other Family member serve as Sucessor Co-Trustees of their own Trusts rather than having a Corporate Trustee. Counsel also raised concern about Mr. Mandell the current acting Trustee not providing an acccounting. The Court stated that it was not completely satisfied with having the Sister serve and continued the matter to August 25, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to provide something further for the Court's consideration.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition For Order Modifying Testamentary Trusts And Appointing Successor Trustees; Memo Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Jul-07-2010 Continued To Jul-21-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
